question: I'm analyzing crime around Van Nuys Airport. After identifying the LAPD area that covers the neighborhood containing the airport, what was the most common crime recorded there in the year (within 2017-2022) that has the lowest total traffic volume reported by the New York City Department of Transportation? Tell me the total number of those crime incidents across Los Angeles in that same year. Only report the total number in your response. Your response should be in the format [Answer].

1.fact: Summing Vol by Yr for 2017-2022, the minimum total is 4497946 in 2020.
1.subquestion: Which year from 2017-2022 has the lowest total traffic volume reported by the New York City Department of Transportation? (Sum Vol by Yr and select the minimum.)

2.fact: Van Nuys Airport is in the Van Nuys neighborhood of Los Angeles, California.
2.subquestion: Van Nuys Airport is in which Los Angeles neighborhood?

3.fact: Filter to Area Name = 'Van Nuys'; the corresponding Area ID is 9 (values appear as 9/09 in this file). This maps the area name to its numeric ID.
3.subquestion: In LAPD stop-incident entries, what Area ID corresponds to area name <node_2 answer> (answer as an integer)?

4.fact: Filter to year <node_1 answer> and Area = <node_3 answer>; group by Crm Cd and count incidents; code 510 has the highest count (915; no tie observed). This identifies the most common crime code in that area.
4.subquestion: In <node_1 answer> crime entries for Area ID <node_3 answer>, which crime code is most common?

5.fact: Filter to Crm Cd = <node_4 answer>; the corresponding crime description is VEHICLE - STOLEN (unique mapping in this file). This maps the code to its description.
5.subquestion: In 2010 to 2019 crime entries, what crime description corresponds to crime code <node_4 answer>?

6.fact: Filter to year <node_1 answer> and Crm Cd Desc = <node_5 answer>; count incidents; the total is 29,141. This provides the 2020 incident count for that description.
6.subquestion: In <node_1 answer> crime entries, how many incidents had crime description <node_5 answer>?

reasoning_chain: Node 1: NYC automated traffic volume data -> Lowest traffic volume (2017-2022) is 2020
Node 2: Wikipedia -> Van Nuys Airport is in the Van Nuys neighborhood of Los Angeles
